Video.summary: What makes ancient Egypt so interesting? How do we know what we know about it?
Video.title: Introduction to the History of Ancient Egypt

Image.alt: Introduction to the History of Ancient Egypt
Introduction to the History of Ancient Egypt
Introduction to the History of Ancient Egypt

Video.summary: In this lesson, examine the difficulties of studying a prehistoric civilization.
Video.title: Prehistoric Egypt

Video.summary: What role did mythology, religion, and philosophy play in the lives of ancient Egyptians?
Video.title: Ancient Egyptian Thought

Video.summary: Why does modern Egyptology begin with Napoleon?
Video.title: Napoleon and the Beginnings of Egyptology

Image.alt: Napoleon and the Beginnings of Egyptology
Napoleon and the Beginnings of Egyptology
Napoleon and the Beginnings of Egyptology

Video.summary: Learn the four scripts of ancient Egyptian, and the three ways to use hieroglyphic signs.
Video.title: The Rosetta Stone, and Much More

Image.alt: The Rosetta Stone, and Much More
The Rosetta Stone, and Much More
The Rosetta Stone, and Much More

Video.summary: Learn how Egypt, under King Narmer, become history\'s first nation.
Video.title: The First Nation in History

Video.summary: As Egypt becomes a great nation led by a single ruler, traditions arise that will last for millennia.
Video.title: The Rise of the Old Kingdom

Image.alt: The Rise of the Old Kingdom
The Rise of the Old Kingdom
The Rise of the Old Kingdom

Video.summary: This lesson presents a portrait of the founder of the "Fabulous Fourth" Dynasty, Sneferu.
Video.title: Sneferu, the Pyramid Builder

Video.summary: In this episode, understand why ancient Egypt had to invent some form of writing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: Why Egypt Needed Hieroglyphs

Video.summary: Professor Brier shows you how to write each hieroglyph and how to position them.
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: The Ancient Egyptian Alphabet

Video.summary: How is it possible for a language used by the world's greatest civilization to become lost?
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: How a Language Becomes Lost

Video.summary: Explore how hieroglyphs, and the ability to read them, was rediscovered during Napoleon's invasion of Egypt.
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: Napoleon in Egypt

Video.summary: Examine the reasons why so many scholars made the error of treating hieroglyphs like picture writing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: Early Attempts to Decipher the Rosetta Stone

Image.alt: Early Attempts to Decipher the Rosetta Stone
Early Attempts to Decipher the Rosetta Stone
Early Attempts to Decipher the Rosetta Stone

Video.summary: Learn how several key discoveries showed how to decipher hieroglyphs the right way.
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: William Bankes and the Keys to Decipherment

Image.alt: William Bankes and the Keys to Decipherment
William Bankes and the Keys to Decipherment
William Bankes and the Keys to Decipherment

Video.summary: Meet Jean-François Champollion, who corrected the "Big Mistake" in reading hieroglyphs.
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: Jean-François Champollion Cracks the Code

Video.summary: Learn how to work with suffix pronouns, then investigate the role of the creator god Ptah.
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: Suffix Pronouns and the Hieroglyphs of Ptah

Image.alt: Suffix Pronouns and the Hieroglyphs of Ptah
Suffix Pronouns and the Hieroglyphs of Ptah
Suffix Pronouns and the Hieroglyphs of Ptah

Video.summary: Grasp the diversity of early South American cultures.
Video.title: South America's Lost Cradle of Civilization

Image.alt: South America's Lost Cradle of Civilization
South America's Lost Cradle of Civilization
South America's Lost Cradle of Civilization

Video.summary: Explore the means of subsistence for Peru's coastal and inland valley cities.
Video.title: Discovering Peru's Earliest Cities

Video.summary: Here, investigate the important Monte Verde site and its view into everyday life 15,000 years ago.
Video.title: South America's First People

Video.summary: Observe pivotal changes in northern Peruvian societies in 1800-900 B.C.
Video.title: Ceramics, Textiles, and Organized States

Video.summary: Consider why wandering ancient humans left the forests and plains to create settlements.
Video.title: The Lure of the City

Video.summary: Built in layers on a small mound, the world's first city offers a window into the Neolithic era.
Video.title: Catalhoyuk - First Experiment in Urban Living

Image.alt: Catalhoyuk - First Experiment in Urban Living
Catalhoyuk - First Experiment in Urban Living
Catalhoyuk - First Experiment in Urban Living

Video.summary: Look past the biblical story and find out what architectural remains suggest about Jericho.
Video.title: Jericho and Its Walls

Video.summary: Located in the heart of Mesopotamia, Uruk exhibits many hallmarks of ancient civilization.
Video.title: Uruk - City of Gilgamesh
